title: galium serpenticum subsp. malheurense
intro: Galium serpenticum subsp. malheurense is a lesser-known subspecies of the Galium serpenticum plant, a type of flowering plant in the bedstraw family (Rubiaceae). Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Galium serpenticum subsp. malheurense include relief from menstrual cramps, digestive issues, and skin irritations, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to support overall health and well-being.
